title: citrus × virgata
intro: Citrus × virgata, also known as the Meyer lemon or Meyer citron, is a hybrid citrus plant resulting from the cross between a lemon (Citrus limon) and an orange (Citrus sinensis). The medicinal properties of Citrus × virgata include its high concentration of vitamin C, flavonoids, and limonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Citrus × virgata include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, while its essential oils have been traditionally used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Citrus × virgata include teas, infusions, and juices, which can be consumed fresh or dried and used in various remedies, such as relieving nausea and promoting relaxation.
